passiveAbilities.name: Augments
passiveAbilities.description: Friendly charactres with Reload[...] gain the Machine keyword.

passiveAbilities.name: The Faculty
passiveAbilities.description: If Old Polly, Prod. Boffinsworth and Flinders Memphis were taken in this troupe at the start of the game, this character gains Rogue, Animal and Machine keywords.

activeAbilities.name: Overclock
activeAbilities.description: Target other friendly machine suffers 1 Wd, then may take any action available to them which would normally have an energy cost of (2). You may only target each character once per turn.

activeAbilities.name: Have You Tired Turning it Off and On Again?
activeAbilities.description: After a friendly Machine draws an Arcane Hand, they may suffer 1 Wd, shuffle the hand back into the Arcane deck and redraw the same number of cards (Resist Hand is unchanged).

arcaneAbilities.name: Gnomish Air Rifle
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X+1 Impact Dmg
Catastrophe: This character suffers 4 Wds

signatureMove.name: Compressed Air
signatureMove.endStepEffect: This model suffers 1 Wd. All other models within 1" suffer 1 Wd then are moved 2" directly away.
